description: A bitstream functionally fails regardless of frequency because hold violations were ignored as if slowing the clock would help.
body: Failure mode: short paths violate hold time, but the team lowers the clock expecting improvement, leaving the hold failures intact because hold is independent of period. Detection signals: persistent hold warnings unchanged by frequency, functional errors at every clock rate, and short-path violations in the report. Do not generate a bitstream while hold violations remain. Safer fallback: add clock-skew or uncertainty constraints and let the tool insert delay, then confirm positive hold slack before bitstream.
